caption:
🍽️✨ When dinner turns into a movie…

From flying spices to dancing tomatoes – this is not your average night out.
Welcome to Le Petit Chef Dubai 🎩👨‍🍳

Save this for your next Dubai trip.

transcription.text: Open up the door, can you open up the door? I know you said before, you can't cope with anymore You told me it was war, so you'd show me what's in store I hope it's not for sure, can you open up the door?
